decision.rationale: The plate fully honors all cited identity rules: 1) 'IR.claude-mascot.proportion.rounded-box-silhouette' is met as the body is a single rounded box with no separate head, featuring generously radiused corners. 2) 'IR.claude-mascot.anatomy.two-ear-arm-nubs' is met with two short, unarticulated cylindrical nubs projecting horizontally from the side planes. 3) 'IR.claude-mascot.anatomy.four-stub-legs' is honored, showing short, rounded peg-like legs set close under the body; in this three-quarter back view, three legs are clearly visible while the fourth is naturally occluded by the perspective of the box footprint. 4) 'IR.claude-mascot.style.warm-graphite-line-cross-hatch' is met with warm graphite contour lines and hand-drawn pencil hatching/cross-hatching for shading over the terracotta fill. 5) 'IR.claude-mascot.style.cream-paper-and-cast-shadow' is met, showing the character on a textured cream paper substrate with a loose, hand-drawn scribbled ellipse cast shadow beneath it.
